# Version 4.151.0 (Unreleased)
> **Performance ports and WASM fixes**

## Highlights

Performance-critical colour and interop paths are ported to managed code, and WASM exception handling is updated.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Bug Fixes

- **CPU raster rendering regression fixed** — Restored SK_ENABLE_LEGACY_SHADERCONTEXT to resolve a CPU raster regression introduced after the m151 engine sync. ([#4428](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4428))

## Platform

- **WASM exception handling updated** — emsdk 5.0.6 libraries are now built with the new exnref exception-handling model required by recent .NET WASM targets. ([#4487](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4487))
